title: [PropertyDataTypes]
html:
[PropertyDataTypes]

Add to My Topics

    • Uniface
    • 10.4

This section, as defined in the uproperties.ini file, defines one or more property datatypes to be used by property definitions, where each line is a single datatype definition. The property datatype defines the user interaction for a property in the Property Inspector of the DSP Component Editor in the IDE.

Syntax

[propertydatatypes]
DataTypeName1 = Widget1{;ValueValidationRule1;ValueSyntax1}
DataTypeName2 = Widget2{;ValueValidationRule2;ValueSyntax2}
DataTypeNameN = WidgetN{;ValueValidationRuleN;ValueSyntaxN}

See the following table for syntax description:

Table 1. PropertyDataTypes syntax description
Syntax Description
DataTypeName Specifies the name of the data type as referred to by the datatype definition of the property.
Widget

Specifies the widget to be used to change value of a property in the Property Inspector. Options are:

Options Description
checkbox Specifies that the value of a property is edited using a checkbox resulting in a property value of either "0" or "1"
dropdownlist Specifies that the value of a property is edited using a dropdown-list where the options are specified by choice definition of the property
colorbox Specifies that the value of a property is edited using a color-box resulting in either a web color, system color, decimal RBG color, or hexadecimal RGB color.
singleline Specifies that the value of a property is edited using a single-line text control resulting in a string without any carriage-returns.
multiline Specifies that the value of a property is edited using a multi-line text control resulting in a string that can contain carriage-returns.
ValueValidationRule

Specifies a validation rule which the entered value needs to pass. The rule should be a ProcScript condition that returns true if the entered value is valid, where the variable VALUE holds the to be validated value. The rule should not contain any semi-colon as that is interpreted as the end of the rule.

Some examples:

  • VALUE == 0 ; Value must be zero
  • VALUE > 0 ; value is a positive number
  • VALUE < 0 ; value is a negative number
  • VALUE >= 1 && VALUE <= 10 ; value is a number between 1 and 10 including 1 and 10
ValueSyntax Specifies a syntax definition the entered value needs to pass. The syntax definition should be specified as a Uniface syntax string. The syntax definition should not contain any semi-colon as that is interpreted as the end of the definition.

Example:

[propertydatatypes]
boolean=checkbox
choice=dropdownlist
string=singleline
text=multiline
positive_float=singleline;VALUE>0;##*(.##*)
length=singleline;;(-)##*(.##*)(em)(ex)(px)(in)(cm)(mm)(pt)(pc)(%% )(fr)
Related Links
  • uproperties.ini

    The uproperties.ini file defines the syntax of properties as well as property groups for web widgets.
